query: Fix workspace root warning so normal git repo roots do not always look like monorepos
slice_title: Suppress workspace-root warning for normal git repo roots
goal: Record progress for `Fix workspace root warning so normal git repo roots do not always look like monorepos`.
description: Suppressed workspace-root warnings for normal selected Git repo roots with child app package folders, while preserving warnings for workspace parents and roots containing multiple nested Git repos.

learnings.summary: A top-level .git root should be treated as intentionally selected unless candidate child roots are themselves nested Git repos; otherwise api/web/signer package layouts produce noisy false-positive workspace warnings.
